title: Heuristic Function Selection & Evaluation in Logical Agents
description: A flowchart illustrating how a logical agent selects, applies, and evaluates heuristic functions to guide its search towards optimal solutions.
relationships: Agent uses KB to select a heuristic
Heuristic estimates cost from any state to goal
Evaluation function combines path cost (g(n)) and heuristic estimate (h(n)) to prioritize states
Process repeats until goal is reached or proven unreachable
